diff: Until the Powerhouse system supports submitting Artifact Edit Proposals, AGENT6 token holders may submit Artifact Edit Proposals by posting them to the Sky Forum under the "Launch Agent 6 Prime" category. The title of the post must include the text "Launch Agent 6 Artifact Edit Proposal". The post must include cryptographic proof that the author controls an account holding the required percentage of the total AGENT6 token supply specified in [Root Edit Proposal Submission](70c91853-b74b-4c6b-befb-8446f00c9691).
